full_description:
I’m gearing up for a data-driven initiative that spans the full spectrum—from raw ingestion through insight delivery—and I want a senior-level data scientist to steer the technical work. The scope is intentionally broad right now because I’m still gathering business requirements, but the essentials are clear:

• You’ll clean, explore, and engineer features from whatever data sources we finalise (they may include structured tables, free-text logs, images, or time-series feeds). 
• When the data story warrants it, you’ll build and validate predictive or prescriptive models in Python or R, leveraging libraries such as pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Prophet, or similar. 
• Clear, decision-ready output matters, so expect to create concise visualisations or dashboards—Tableau, Power BI, or matplotlib/Plotly—alongside well-annotated notebooks and a short slide deck summarising key findings. 
• Every step should be reproducible. Please version your code in Git and containerise any complex environments with Docker so I can run everything on my end without guesswork.

Deliverables I’ll review for acceptance 
1. A Git repository containing notebooks/scripts, modular functions, and a README that explains setup and usage. 
2. A standalone model artefact (if modelling is required) with instructions for retraining and inference. 
3. A share-link or packaged dashboard plus a brief report (5–10 slides) highlighting insights, limitations, and next steps.

I’m happy to iterate on requirements as we refine the problem statement together, but I need someone who is comfortable making the first technical moves with limited upfront direction and who communicates clearly about assumptions, risks, and trade-offs. If that sounds like you, let’s get started.

full_description:
My luxury brand needs a business card that feels as refined as the products we offer. The overall aesthetic should be elegant, restrained and unmistakably high-end; think clean typography, generous white space and perfect alignment that lets quality speak for itself. 

Gold foil accents are essential—I’d like them used to highlight the logo or a key detail so the card catches the light without appearing ostentatious. I’m open to complementary touches such as subtle embossing or a premium matte stock if they enhance the final effect, but the foil must remain the star.

Content is straightforward: company logo, my name and title, plus direct contact details (phone and email). Please design both front and back, proposing the most balanced layout for readability while preserving the air of exclusivity.

Deliverables
• Print-ready PDF in CMYK with 3 mm bleed and crop marks 
• Editable source file (AI or InDesign) with outlined fonts and linked assets 
• High-resolution mock-up to preview foil placement 

Acceptance criteria: the foil areas must be on a separate layer and clearly marked for the printer; text and logo must remain crisp at 300 dpi when zoomed to 150 %.

full_description:
I’m producing a series of short, entertainment-driven YouTube videos that rely on very simple, hand-drawn stick figure storytelling. Each piece moves from scene to scene with just enough motion—subtle pans, zooms, expression changes, and the occasional limb shift—to keep the viewer engaged while preserving an intentionally minimal look.

What I need from you is the full visual pass: clean line illustrations, basic key-frame or frame-by-frame movement, and light editing that stitches each scene together into a cohesive narrative. Think moving storybook pages rather than polished motion-graphics; the charm comes from the human touch and slight imperfections.

The style guidelines are straightforward:
• Hand-drawn, human, and emotionally expressive 
• Simple shapes, uncluttered compositions, no glossy gradients 
• Absolutely no corporate explainer vibe, flashy transitions, heavy particle effects, or AI-generated slickness 
• Flat 2D artwork only—no 3D or hyper-realistic rendering

If this kind of understated, story-first cartoon work excites you, let’s talk and see one of your minimalist samples.

full_description:
Project Title

Modernize Existing YouTube Qur'an Videos with Real-Time Karaoke-Style Arabic Word Highlighting

Project Overview

I operate a YouTube channel containing Qur'an recitation videos. I am looking for a skilled developer or video automation specialist to modernize these videos by adding real-time karaoke-style Arabic word highlighting that follows the reciter precisely.

The goal is to make the videos significantly more engaging and easier to follow, allowing viewers to read the Arabic text naturally as each word is recited.

This is not simple subtitle timing or verse highlighting. I require accurate word-by-word synchronization, similar to karaoke lyrics, where each spoken word is highlighted at the exact moment it is recited.

Example Video

The following video represents the current style that I would like to modernize:

[login to view URL]

The final result should retain the beautiful presentation while introducing modern, smooth, and accurate word-by-word highlighting throughout the recitation.

Demo Requirement (Mandatory)

Before awarding the full project, you must produce a demonstration using the above Surah Al-Kawthar video.

The demo should include:

- Smooth karaoke-style word highlighting.
- Accurate synchronization with the recitation.
- Beautiful Uthmani Arabic script.
- Professional visual appearance suitable for YouTube.
- Playback that remains synchronized throughout the surah.

Freelancers who can demonstrate a convincing proof of concept will be given priority.

Project Objectives

The completed solution should:

- Modernize existing Qur'an videos.
- Synchronize every Arabic word with the audio.
- Produce a visually elegant viewing experience.
- Be scalable so the same workflow can be applied to all 114 surahs.
- Support different reciters in future if required.

Preferred Workflow

Ideally, I would like a workflow that can be repeated for future videos with minimal manual work.

Please explain your proposed approach, for example:

- Automatic word alignment.
- Forced audio/text synchronization.
- AI-assisted timestamp generation.
- Manual refinement where necessary.
- Video rendering pipeline.

Automation is highly preferred if it can maintain excellent synchronization accuracy.

Deliverables

- Working demonstration using the supplied Surah Al-Kawthar video.
- Source files and project files.
- Any scripts or software developed for the workflow.
- Documentation explaining how additional surahs can be generated.
- Final rendered YouTube-ready video.
- Clear instructions for reproducing the process.

Required Experience

Please include examples of previous work involving:

- Audio and text synchronization.
- Karaoke-style lyric animation.
- Motion graphics.
- Arabic typography.
- AI speech alignment or subtitle generation.
- Video automation pipelines.

Long-Term Opportunity

This project is intended to become a complete modernization of an existing Qur'an YouTube library. If the demonstration is successful, the freelancer will have the opportunity to work on synchronizing and producing all remaining Qur'an videos using the same workflow.

The primary goal is to create one of the highest-quality Qur'an reading experiences on YouTube, where viewers can effortlessly follow every Arabic word as it is recited with precise, elegant, and visually appealing synchronization.

full_description:
A Memorable Journey to Manali: Exploring the Heart of the Himalayas

Travel has a unique way of enriching our lives. It allows us to step away from our daily routines, discover new places, meet different people, and create memories that last a lifetime. Among the many beautiful destinations in India, Manali stands out as one of the most enchanting hill stations. Nestled in the majestic Himalayas of Himachal Pradesh, Manali offers breathtaking landscapes, pleasant weather, adventure activities, and a peaceful atmosphere that attracts travelers from all over the world.

My journey to Manali began on a cool summer morning. After months of planning and excitement, I finally boarded a bus from Delhi to Manali. The overnight journey was long but enjoyable. As the bus moved through winding mountain roads, the scenery gradually transformed from bustling cities to lush green valleys and towering mountains. The fresh mountain air and stunning views immediately made me feel relaxed and refreshed.

Upon arriving in Manali, I was greeted by the sight of snow-capped peaks and the soothing sound of the Beas River flowing nearby. The town was surrounded by dense pine forests and colorful houses that blended beautifully with the natural landscape. After checking into a cozy hotel, I took some time to rest before beginning my exploration of this charming destination.

One of the first places I visited was the famous Hadimba Devi Temple. Surrounded by cedar forests, this ancient temple is dedicated to Goddess Hadimba, a character from the Indian epic Mahabharata. Built in the sixteenth century, the temple is known for its unique wooden architecture and peaceful environment. Walking through the forest paths leading to the temple felt like stepping into a different world. The calm atmosphere and historical significance of the site made it a memorable experience.

The next destination on my itinerary was Mall Road, the bustling heart of Manali. This vibrant street is lined with shops, cafes, restaurants, and local markets. Visitors can buy traditional handicrafts, woolen clothes, souvenirs, and handmade jewelry. I spent several hours exploring the market and interacting with local shopkeepers. The warm hospitality of the people added a special charm to the experience. I also enjoyed delicious local dishes, including Himachali cuisine that introduced me to new flavors and culinary traditions.

No trip to Manali is complete without visiting Solang Valley. Located a short distance from the town, Solang Valley is famous for its adventure activities and spectacular views. The valley offers opportunities for paragliding, zip-lining, skiing, and snowboarding depending on the season. As an adventure enthusiast, I decided to try paragliding for the first time.

Standing at the edge of the takeoff point, I felt both nervous and excited. Within moments, I was soaring high above the valley, enjoying a bird’s-eye view of the mountains, forests, and rivers below. The experience was exhilarating and unforgettable. Floating through the sky while surrounded by the beauty of nature gave me a sense of freedom unlike anything I had ever experienced before.

Another highlight of my trip was visiting the Rohtang Pass. Located at an altitude of over 13,000 feet, this mountain pass offers some of the most spectacular scenery in the region. The journey to Rohtang Pass itself was an adventure, with winding roads and breathtaking viewpoints along the way. Upon reaching the pass, I was amazed by the vast stretches of snow and the panoramic views of the surrounding peaks.

The cold mountain air and dazzling white landscape created a magical atmosphere. Visitors were enjoying snow activities, taking photographs, and simply admiring the beauty of the Himalayas. Spending time at Rohtang Pass was one of the most memorable moments of my entire journey.

Beyond the popular tourist attractions, Manali also offers opportunities for peaceful nature walks and exploration. One morning, I decided to visit Old Manali, a quieter part of the town known for its rustic charm and relaxed atmosphere. The narrow lanes, traditional houses, and scenic surroundings created a unique experience. Small cafes offered stunning mountain views and a chance to enjoy freshly brewed coffee while watching the world go by.

Old Manali is also a great place to connect with fellow travelers from different countries. During my visit, I met people who shared fascinating travel stories and recommendations. These conversations reminded me that travel is not only about places but also about the connections we make along the way.

The natural beauty of Manali extends far beyond its famous landmarks. Throughout my stay, I found joy in simple moments such as listening to the sound of the Beas River, watching the sunrise over the mountains, and breathing in the crisp mountain air. These experiences helped me appreciate the beauty and tranquility of nature.

One evening, I visited a riverside spot where I sat quietly and reflected on my journey. The river flowed steadily, carrying melted snow from distant glaciers. The setting sun painted the mountains in shades of orange and pink, creating a scene that seemed almost unreal. It was a perfect reminder of how travel allows us to reconnect with ourselves and the world around us.

Manali is also known for its rich culture and traditions. During my trip, I had the opportunity to witness local festivals and interact with residents who proudly shared stories about their heritage. Their deep connection to the mountains and respect for nature left a lasting impression on me. Learning about local customs added another layer of meaning to my travel experience.

As my journey came to an end, I realized that Manali had given me much more than beautiful photographs and exciting adventures. It had provided moments of peace, opportunities for personal growth, and memories that would stay with me forever. The combination of natural beauty, cultural richness, and warm hospitality makes Manali a truly special destination.

For anyone seeking a getaway from the fast pace of city life, Manali offers the perfect escape. Whether you are an adventure seeker, a nature lover, a photographer, or simply someone looking for relaxation, this Himalayan paradise has something to offer. From the serene forests and ancient temples to the thrilling activities and majestic mountains, every corner of Manali tells a story waiting to be discovered.

Traveling to Manali reminded me that the best journeys are not measured by distance but by the experiences and memories they create. As I boarded the bus back home, I carried with me a renewed appreciation for nature, a collection of unforgettable moments, and a promise to return one day to this beautiful corner of the Himalayas.

If you are planning your next travel adventure, consider adding Manali to your list. Its breathtaking landscapes, welcoming people, and unforgettable experiences make it a destination that truly captures the heart of every traveler.

full_description:
I’m launching a new dropshipping venture on Shopify and want the entire storefront ready to start selling fast. The store itself is still blank, so I need help shaping it from the ground up and then connecting it smoothly to TikTok Shop.

Here is what I’m looking for: 
• Store setup & design – I don’t have a theme chosen yet, so please suggest modern, conversion-focused themes and tailor the look to match a “page-pilot” style brand. 
• Product listing & management – import winning products, optimise titles, images, variants and descriptions, set the right collections, and configure fulfilment settings for a seamless dropshipping workflow. 
• Integration with TikTok Shop – handle the entire connection process, make sure catalogues sync correctly, and verify that orders flow back into Shopify without errors.

Acceptance criteria 
1. Store is live with a polished, responsive theme, branded colours, basic pages (Home, Product, About, Contact, Policies). 
2. Minimum of 20 optimised products live and grouped in logical collections. 
3. TikTok Shop is connected, products approved, checkout tested end-to-end. 
4. Clear hand-off document covering theme edits, installed apps, and daily fulfilment process.

If you have previous success stories linking Shopify to TikTok Shop, I’d love to see them. Let’s build something that sells from day one.

title_raw: تعديل وتركيب تطبيق شات صوتي كامل (Rayzi) على أندرويد وآيفون
title_clean: تعديل وتركيب تطبيق شات صوتي كامل rayzi علي اندرويد وايفون السلام عليكم،ابحث مبرمج محترف وموثوق للعمل علي تخصيص وتعديل تط
cleaned_text: تعديل وتركيب تطبيق شات صوتي كامل rayzi علي اندرويد وايفون السلام عليكم،ابحث مبرمج محترف وموثوق للعمل علي تخصيص وتعديل تطبيق شات صوتي وغرف دردشه شبيه بتطبيقات يلا لايف ومرحبا وسوغو ساقوم بشراء الكود المصدري الكامل لتطبيق rayzi موقع codecanyon، والمطلوب المستقل القيام بالمهام التاليه تركيب لوحه تحكم المدير admin panel واعدادها بالكامل علي الاستضافه والسيرفر الخاص بي.ربط التطبيق بالخدمات الاساسيه سيرفر الصوت agora وقاعده البيانات وحسابات المستخدمين firebase تخصيص التطبيق بالكامل تغيير الاسم، تغيير الشعار اللوجو تعديل الالوان، والايقونات هويتي الخاصه.استخراج النسخ النهاييه وتجربتها، رفعها بنجاح علي حسابات المطورين الخاصه متجر جوجل بلاي وابل ستور وتجاوز المراجعه.شروط هامه يرجي لديه تجربه سابقه تركيب تطبيق rayzi او تطبيقات مشابهه ارفاق روابط اعماله.الالتزام بتقديم الدعم الفني لفتره قصيره الاطلاق للتاكد استقرار النظام.شكرا وبانتظار عروضكم لبدء العمل فورا اختبار تطبيقات الجوال اختبار البرمجيات تطوير البرمجيات هندسه البرمجيات تطوير التطبيقات برمجه ios تصميم تطبيقات برمجه التطبيقات unknown
full_description: السلام عليكم،أبحث عن مبرمج محترف وموثوق للعمل على تخصيص وتعديل تطبيق شات صوتي وغرف دردشة (شبيه بتطبيقات يلا لايف ومرحبًا وسوغو).سأقوم بشراء الكود المصدري الكامل لتطبيق Rayzi من موقع CodeCanyon، والمطلوب من المستقل القيام بالمهام التالية:تركيب لوحة تحكم المدير (Admin Panel) وإعدادها بالكامل على الاستضافة والسيرفر الخاص بي.ربط التطبيق بالخدمات الأساسية: سيرفر الصوت (Agora) وقاعدة البيانات وحسابات المستخدمين (Firebase).تخصيص التطبيق بالكامل: تغيير الاسم، تغيير الشعار (اللوجو)، تعديل الألوان، والأيقونات حسب هويتي الخاصة.استخراج النسخ النهائية وتجربتها، ثم رفعها بنجاح على حسابات المطورين الخاصة بي في متجر جوجل بلاي وآبل ستور وتجاوز المراجعة.شروط هامة:يرجى ممن لديه تجربة سابقة في تركيب تطبيق Rayzi أو تطبيقات مشابهة إرفاق روابط أعماله.الالتزام بتقديم الدعم الفني لفترة قصيرة بعد الإطلاق للتأكد من استقرار النظام.شكراً لكم وبانتظار عروضكم لبدء العمل فوراً.
